title: Bas Hamstra
text: Home * People * Bas Hamstra Bas Hamstra [1] Bas Hamstra , a Dutch software developer, and as computer chess programmer, author of the Chess Engine Communication Protocol and later UCI [2] compliant chess engine Tao . He was also involved in the early development of Bookbuilder .
